scroll_found.title: Research the Industrial scroll at a Research Pedestal

factory_running.title: Run a full automated Create production line for at least 5 minutes without manual input

subtitle.text: The scroll describes the age change from craft to production. You're living through the same transition.

description: CH.07 · THE INDUSTRIAL
▸ The Industrial scroll describes the moment
a civilization stops making things by hand.
It does not romanticize it.
It says: this is necessary.
What comes next requires this.
◈ THE INDUSTRIAL AGE PROGRESSION
└ Water Wheel → Steam → Diesel → Electric (Ch10)
└ Each step: same infrastructure, more power
└ Each step: same components, better materials
└ The factory that ran on water wheels
still runs on the same belts when you swap the engine
◈ WHAT THE SCROLL WARNS
└ 'The factory that runs itself also breaks itself.'
└ Automated farms can overflow → voiding upgrades
└ Stress overloads stop all machines
└ Oil runs out — keep refinery topped up
└ The history of civilizations is also the history
of what they forgot to maintain
◈ SCROLL: The Industrial
└ Found in: large factory ruins, industrial guild archives,
Create workshop chests
└ Research time: 30 min
└ Unlocks: industrial age lore, automation failure awareness
▸ The scroll's author watched their civilization
build faster and faster.
Then one day the factory stopped.
The scroll explains why.
Learn from it.
▶ Find The Industrial scroll [check]
▶ Run an automated production line 5 min without input [check]
◇ The Blood and Oil History Stages milestone triggers
when TFMG Bitumen is first processed.
If you haven't gotten that milestone yet,
process oil through the Distillation Tower.
